text:
was a mini game featured in ' second collaboration with the Rebuild of Evangelion film series: SECOND QUEST.

Gameplay

The game was a top down shooter mini game, the player could control the Evangelion and shoot the Raptures. The player could tap and drag anywhere on the screen to move the Evangelion. Raptures would attack the pilot and he could be at risk if the Evangelion's cockpit takes direct hit. By dealing damage to the enemy, it would recharge energy. Once fully charged, the A.T. Field could be used. The effects of the A.T. Field would vary depending on the type of Evangelion.

Gameplay Mechanics

Completing missions, would gave the player, Mighty Equipment Box and Mighty Tools, items that could be used to upgrade the Evangelions. 

There were 5 parts upgrades:
Extra Weapon
Increases attack of extra weapons.
A.T. Field
Enhances the effect of A.T. Field.
Armor Part
Increases Health points of the Evangelions.
Recycling Efficiency
Increases acquisition range.
Portable Weapon
Increases the attack of the Evangelions.

There was two mission lists: daily ones and challenge ones, that gave items in the main game when completed. There was 3 difficulties, easy, hard and 10 minutes challenge mode. Some maps had Collection Items, 16 in total, each item had a description that after getting all 4, would form an image related to the collaboration. 

The playable Evangelions were: Evangelion Mark.09, who exceed in defense and close combat, though lacked focused firepower against single targets. Evangelion Unit-08γ, who possessed pinpoint accuracy and exceed at precision strikes. Evangelion New Unit-02α, who possessed exceptional firepower and devastating area-of-effect bombardment capabilities. 

There was two types of extra weapons: Artillery Type, that had high destructive but had a slow reload speed and Assault Type, that was stable and reliable continuously flamethrower. https://x.com/NIKKE_japan/status/1891330221581664415 

Characters

Evangelion Units

Evangelion Mark.09
Evangelion Unit-08γ (Unlockable)
Evangelion New Unit-02α (Unlockable)

Mutant Raptures

E-Cutter
Skills: Command: Lock On, Command: Bomb and Command: Suppress.

E-Arkanoid
Skills: Direct Attack, Auto Aim Shooting and Double Sniper Shot.

E-Tripod
Skills: Blazing Ray, Spiral Bullet and Barrage Explosion.

Mimicry - Massive Object Q
Skills: High Beam Laser, Baptism of Mercy, Enemy's Resistence, Soul's Guidance and Adam's Summon.

Mimicry - Grave Digger
Skills: Strongest Sniper Shot, The Last Judgement, Moving Barrage, Overload Sniper Shot and Error Code

Mimicry - Modernia
Skills: Scattered Feathers, Piercing Feathers, Closed Wings, Expanded Wings and Chaotic Attack.

Mimicry - Mother Whale
Skills: Great Flood, Mass Extinction, Crisis of the World, Wave Expansion and Whale's Explosion Sound.

Mimicry - Kraken
Skills: Torpedoes?, Wild Tentacles, Massive Wave, Barrage Whirpool and Attack of Waves.

Mimicry - Chatterbox
Skills: Rhythm Missile, Area Bombardment, Shrieking Sniper Shot, Demonic Dance and Fury Burst.

Trivia

Evangelion Mark.09 is seen using a ranged weapon, which it doesn't use in the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
A group of Failure of Infinities can be seen in the background.
